requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — ABNORM and Donor / Lender Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——ABNORM及捐助方/贷款方采购
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——ABNORM及捐助方/貸款方採購

summary.en: ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) adopts IEC standards as the national reference for Burkina Faso. For PV inverter EMC, the applicable IEC standards are: IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current ≤16 A per phase). Burkina Faso does not have a separately published national mandatory EMC regulation specifically for PV inverters as of the knowledge cutoff; however, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC test evidence is expected by: (a) SONABEL and ARSE as part of grid-connection and licensing technical review for grid-tied inverters; (b) donor/lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AFD, AfDB, EU) for both grid-tied and off-grid project equipment. Burkina Faso is a francophone country; French-language technical documentation alongside English IEC test reports is recommended for ABNORM, ARSE, and SONABEL submission.
summary.zh: ABNORM（布基纳法索标准化、计量与质量局）采纳IEC标准作为布基纳法索的国家参考。对于光伏逆变器EMC，适用的IEC标准为：IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值）。截至知识截止日期，布基纳法索尚无专门针对光伏逆变器的已发布国家强制EMC法规；但以下情况需要IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC测试证据：（a）SONABEL和ARSE针对并网逆变器的并网和许可技术审查；（b）捐助方/贷款方采购规格（世界银行、法开署、非开行、欧盟）对并网和离网项目设备的要求。布基纳法索为法语国家；建议在向ABNORM、ARSE和SONABEL提交时，随英文IEC测试报告一并提供法文技术文件。
summary.zht: ABNORM（布吉納法索標準化、計量與質量局）採納IEC標準作為布吉納法索的國家參考。對於光伏逆變器EMC，適用的IEC標準為：IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值）。截至知識截止日期，布吉納法索尚無專門針對光伏逆變器的已發布國家強制EMC法規；但以下情況需要IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC測試證據：（a）SONABEL和ARSE針對併網逆變器的併網和許可技術審查；（b）捐助方/貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、法開署、非開行、歐盟）對併網和離網項目設備的要求。布吉納法索為法語國家；建議在向ABNORM、ARSE和SONABEL提交時，隨英文IEC測試報告一並提供法文技術文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
ABNORM — Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité (national standards and conformity body — IEC adoption authority)
ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (energy regulator — licensing technical review includes EMC evidence)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods that overlap with Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as applied by ABNORM, SONABEL, and ARSE. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Burkina Faso project submissions or donor/lender procurement.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了与中国国内标准重叠的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2（如ABNORM、SONABEL和ARSE所采用）协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为布基纳法索项目提交或捐助方/贷款方采购的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了與中國國內標準重疊的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2（如ABNORM、SONABEL和ARSE所採用）協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為布吉納法索項目提交或捐助方/貸款方採購的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy ABNORM, SONABEL, ARSE, or donor/lender IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Burkina Faso. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter being supplied. Note that Burkina Faso's grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) is nominally the same as China's grid parameters, so EMC test results obtained under Chinese grid conditions may be applicable without retesting — however, this should be confirmed with the project EMC engineer and SONABEL, as test conditions and installation environment (Sahel heat, dust) may affect harmonic behaviour. Additionally, French-language summaries of IEC EMC test results are recommended for regulatory submissions to ARSE and SONABEL in Burkina Faso.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足布基纳法索ABNORM、SONABEL、ARSE或捐助方/贷款方的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对所供逆变器的功率等级和配置。请注意，布基纳法索电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）名义上与中国电网参数相同，因此在中国电网条件下获取的EMC测试结果可能无需重新测试即可适用——但这须与项目EMC工程师和SONABEL确认，因为测试条件和安装环境（萨赫勒高温、粉尘）可能影响谐波特性。此外，建议为向布基纳法索ARSE和SONABEL的法规提交准备IEC EMC测试结果的法文摘要。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足布吉納法索ABNORM、SONABEL、ARSE或捐助方/貸款方的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對所供逆變器的功率等級和配置。請注意，布吉納法索電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）名義上與中國電網參數相同，因此在中國電網條件下取得的EMC測試結果可能無需重新測試即可適用——但這須與項目EMC工程師和SONABEL確認，因為測試條件和安裝環境（薩赫勒高溫、粉塵）可能影響諧波特性。此外，建議為向布吉納法索ARSE和SONABEL的法規提交準備IEC EMC測試結果的法文摘要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor/lender-financed projects and SONABEL/ARSE grid-connection technical review; no confirmed standalone mandatory national EMC regulation specifically for PV inverters in Burkina Faso as of 2026-06-14 — verify with ABNORM before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: ABNORM — Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité (Burkina Faso)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy ABNORM, SONABEL, ARSE, or donor/lender IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements in Burkina Faso. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. As Burkina Faso's grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) is nominally identical to China's, EMC test results at Chinese grid parameters may be reusable — confirm with the project engineer and SONABEL before assuming equivalence. Prepare French-language technical summaries for regulatory submissions to ARSE and SONABEL.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足布基纳法索ABNORM、SONABEL、ARSE或捐助方/贷款方的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。由于布基纳法索电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）名义上与中国相同，在中国电网参数下的EMC测试结果可能可以复用——在假定等效前，请与项目工程师和SONABEL确认。为向ARSE和SONABEL提交法规文件，请准备法文技术摘要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足布吉納法索ABNORM、SONABEL、ARSE或捐助方/貸款方的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。由於布吉納法索電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）名義上與中國相同，在中國電網參數下的EMC測試結果可能可以複用——在假定等效前，請與項目工程師和SONABEL確認。為向ARSE和SONABEL提交法規文件，請準備法文技術摘要。
